ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_classes" (
  "test_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test class */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or component the test class belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the test class */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test class was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the test class */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test class was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test class the result belongs to */,
  "tests_run" INTEGER /* Number of tests run in this test class */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of tests that failed */,
  "ignored" INTEGER /* Number of tests that were ignored */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test run */,
  "success_rate" TEXT /* Success rate of the tests */,
  "test_run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was run */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of the codebase where the test was run */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the codebase where the test was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_class_id") REFERENCES test_classes ("test_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions or roles assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result the notification is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the recipient of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
